title: oberonia aporophylla
intro: Oberonia aporophylla, also known as the Apoorvulli plant, is a species of orchid native to the Western Ghats region of India. It has been used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Oberonia aporophylla is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
